pwa.tagline: Install the app for quick access from your home screen.
pwa.desktopHint: Chrome or Edge: click the install icon in the address bar, or open the menu (⋮) → Install LAAS24 / Install app.
pwa.iosHint: iPhone / iPad: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
pwa.androidHint: Android: open the browser menu (⋮), then Install app or Add to Home screen.

hero.subtitle: LAAS24 is a simple way to launch your online store, share your link, and receive orders instantly.

home.checkoutImageAlt: Shopper and seller at checkout: paying with a phone at the terminal, WhatsApp-ready commerce
home.checkoutTitle: No complicated checkout. Chat directly with sellers.
home.aiStep1: Upload a clear photo of your product
home.aiStep2: AI drafts title, category, and description
home.aiStep3: Publish to your store and share your link
home.aiImageAlt: Seller at a desk with laptop, camera, and phone — small business and online listings
home.aiDesc: Upload a product photo and let AI draft your product title, category, and description in seconds.

testimonials.title: Loved by sellers & shoppers
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from people building and buying on LAAS24.

topStores.title: Top rated stores
topStores.subtitle: Trusted vendors with strong ratings and WhatsApp-ready storefronts.

roadmap.title: Launch in minutes
roadmap.subtitle: Follow the path from signup to your first WhatsApp order — no complicated checkout in between.

footer.tagline: © 2024 LAAS24. The radiant curator of Somali commerce.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Welcome back — here is what is happening in your store today.

products.title: Products
products.freeLimit: Free plan: up to 20 products and 10 product videos total. Upgrade to Pro for AI listing and higher limits.
products.aiHint: Upload a product photo. AI drafts a title, description, and features — edit before saving.
products.aiFreeHint: AI listing is a Pro feature. Upgrade in Subscription.
products.aiDescription: Sample AI product description — edit before publishing.

fields.name: Product name
fields.videoHint: Optional: one short video (about 1 minute or less). MP4 or WebM recommended; max 45 MB. Up to 4 images above.
fields.legacyVideoNote: This product still uses a pasted link from before file upload. Remove it or keep it; new uploads replace it when you save after choosing a file.
fields.imagesHint: Add 1 to 4 images (at least one required). The first image is used on product cards.

errors.invalidVideo: Video is invalid or too large. Upload a supported file or use a valid legacy link.
errors.videoInvalidType: Choose a video file (MP4, WebM, MOV, etc.).
errors.videoTooLarge: Video file is too large (max 45 MB).
errors.videoTooLong: Video must be 60 seconds or shorter.
errors.videoUnreadable: Could not read this video. Try another file or MP4 export.
errors.imagesMax: You can add at most 4 images.

products.uploadVideoSub: One file only — checked for length before save.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Use WhatsApp from each order to contact buyers.
orders.message: Hi, about your order on LAAS24.

messages.title: Messages
messages.preview: Open WhatsApp to reply to customers faster.
messages.body: You can route buyers to your WhatsApp number from your storefront and order cards.

settings.title: Store settings
settings.logoHint: Square PNG or JPG works best.
settings.bannerHint: Wide image for your store header (JPG or PNG, under ~2 MB recommended).

inventory.noMatch: No products match these filters. Try adjusting category, price, search, or sort.
inventory.emptyStore: No products in this store yet.
